name: 宮廷選秀/體檢場景
description: 將女主的身體暴露於權力審視之下，製造屈辱感和無力感，同時建立宮廷規則的殘酷性。觀眾對女主的同情和對制度的憤怒同時被激發。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: All of you take measurements carefully. Whether it's the waistline, bus size, weight, or height, everything must be strictly recorded. ... Take her to the inner room and take off her clothes. ... Good. Ample bust and slender waist. A figure of flawless beauty.
examples.context: 將女主的身體暴露於權力審視之下，製造屈辱感和無力感，同時建立宮廷規則的殘酷性。觀眾對女主的同情和對制度的憤怒同時被激發。
